subject: Shift swap request
snippet: Hi Mom, quick favor — can you cover my Thursday 7am-7pm on the floor? Tyler has ...
body:
Hi Mom, quick favor — can you cover my Thursday 7am-7pm on the floor? Tyler has a school thing that got moved and Dave can't get off work. I'll owe you big time and I'm happy to take one of your weekend shifts in exchange.

Let me know if that works before I put in the request with scheduling.

subject: Re: Shift swap request
snippet: I can do Thursday, no problem. I already cleared it with the charge nurse just i...
body:
I can do Thursday, no problem. I already cleared it with the charge nurse just in case. Go ahead and submit the swap request and I'll approve it on my end.

Don't worry about owing me anything, just bring the kids by after Tyler's thing so I can see them.

subject: Continuing education credits
snippet: Mom, did you finish your CE hours for this renewal cycle? I just checked mine an...
body:
Mom, did you finish your CE hours for this renewal cycle? I just checked mine and I'm short 6 hours with the deadline coming up fast. There's a decent online module through the hospital portal if you still need some.

Want me to send you the link?

subject: Re: Continuing education credits
snippet: I'm at 18 of 24 so I still need a few too, yes please send the link. I keep mean...
body:
I'm at 18 of 24 so I still need a few too, yes please send the link. I keep meaning to sit down and do it but the shifts have been brutal lately.

Maybe we can knock them out together on our next day off.

subject: Re: Continuing education credits
snippet: Sending it now. It's the wound care and infection control modules, about 2 hours...
body:
Sending it now. It's the wound care and infection control modules, about 2 hours each. Let's do Sunday afternoon at your place, I'll bring the laptop and we can split a pot of coffee.

Better than scrambling the week it's due like last time.

subject: Charge nurse note
snippet: Hey, heads up before your shift starts — bed 4 and bed 7 both have new admits ov...
body:
Hey, heads up before your shift starts — bed 4 and bed 7 both have new admits overnight, and bed 4 is a fall risk so make sure the sitter request actually got put in. I flagged it to the night charge but wanted you to double check.

Also we're short one CNA again today.

subject: Re: Charge nurse note
snippet: Thanks for the heads up. I'll confirm the sitter order first thing. Do you know ...
body: Thanks for the heads up. I'll confirm the sitter order first thing. Do you know if float pool is sending anyone for the CNA gap or should I start making calls?

subject: Re: Charge nurse note
snippet: Float pool said maybe by 11, nothing confirmed. I'd start calling around 9 if no...
body:
Float pool said maybe by 11, nothing confirmed. I'd start calling around 9 if nobody's shown up so you're not stuck scrambling at shift change. Sorry to dump this on you.

Call me if it gets crazy, I can come in early.

subject: Re: Charge nurse note
snippet: Will do, thank you. Sitter order is confirmed for bed 4, all set there. I'll tex...
body: Will do, thank you. Sitter order is confirmed for bed 4, all set there. I'll text you if I need the extra hands, hopefully it doesn't come to that.

subject: Patient family follow-up
snippet: Mom, the Hendersons called the unit again asking for an update on their dad in 1...
body: Mom, the Hendersons called the unit again asking for an update on their dad in 12. I told them to call back when you're on since you've had him most days. Can you give them a ring when you get a chance? They sounded worried.

subject: Re: Patient family follow-up
snippet: I'll call them on my break. He had a decent night, vitals stable, and the doctor...
body: I'll call them on my break. He had a decent night, vitals stable, and the doctor is supposed to round this morning so I'll have more after that. Thanks for passing it along.

subject: Re: Patient family follow-up
snippet: Good to hear. They mentioned they're driving in from out of town tomorrow and wa...
body: Good to hear. They mentioned they're driving in from out of town tomorrow and wanted to know the best time to visit without interrupting care. Might be worth mentioning when you call.

subject: Re: Patient family follow-up
snippet: Talked to his daughter just now, she was relieved to hear he's stable. Told her ...
body: Talked to his daughter just now, she was relieved to hear he's stable. Told her early afternoon is usually quietest on the unit, she said they'll aim for around 1pm tomorrow.

subject: Re: Patient family follow-up
snippet: Perfect, I'll note that in the chart so whoever's on tomorrow knows to expect th...
body: Perfect, I'll note that in the chart so whoever's on tomorrow knows to expect them. You're always so good with the families, they really do notice.

subject: Lunch this week?
snippet: Mom, do you have a day off this week? I was thinking we could grab lunch at that...
body: Mom, do you have a day off this week? I was thinking we could grab lunch at that diner you like near the hospital, my treat. It's been a while since we just sat down without the kids or work stuff.

subject: Re: Lunch this week?
snippet: I'm off Wednesday, that works great. Noon at the diner? I've been craving their ...
body: I'm off Wednesday, that works great. Noon at the diner? I've been craving their soup anyway. Can't wait to catch up properly.

subject: Coffee next Tuesday?
snippet: Hey Mom, any chance you're free Tuesday morning for coffee before your shift? I ...
body: Hey Mom, any chance you're free Tuesday morning for coffee before your shift? I miss just chatting without a hundred things pulling at us.

subject: Re: Coffee next Tuesday?
snippet: I'd love that. My shift starts at noon so mornings are open. Same coffee place o...
body: I'd love that. My shift starts at noon so mornings are open. Same coffee place on Main as last time?

subject: Re: Coffee next Tuesday?
snippet: Works for me, let's say 9am. I'll grab us a table by the window. See you then!
body: Works for me, let's say 9am. I'll grab us a table by the window. See you then!

subject: Birthday brunch plans
snippet: Mom, I'm starting to plan your birthday brunch. Thinking that place downtown wit...
body: Mom, I'm starting to plan your birthday brunch. Thinking that place downtown with the patio, or we could just do it at my house so you can relax. What sounds better to you?

subject: Re: Birthday brunch plans
snippet: Honestly your house sounds lovely, less fuss and I get to see the kids running a...
body: Honestly your house sounds lovely, less fuss and I get to see the kids running around. You really don't have to make a big deal of it though.

subject: Re: Birthday brunch plans
snippet: Too late, it's happening. I'm thinking Saturday around 11, I'll do the quiche yo...
body: Too late, it's happening. I'm thinking Saturday around 11, I'll do the quiche you love and Tyler wants to help make a cake. Anyone specific you want me to invite?

subject: Re: Birthday brunch plans
snippet: That sounds perfect, and yes let's invite your aunt Diane if she's free. Saturda...
body: That sounds perfect, and yes let's invite your aunt Diane if she's free. Saturday at 11 works great, I'll bring the mimosas since I can't cook to save my life.

subject: Renewal options
snippet: Mom, your home insurance renewal notice came to my email since I'm still listed ...
body: Mom, your home insurance renewal notice came to my email since I'm still listed as backup contact. Premium went up about 12% this year. Want me to call and see if there are better options, or just renew as is?

subject: Re: Renewal options
snippet: That's a bigger jump than I expected. Yes please call around, maybe bundling wit...
body: That's a bigger jump than I expected. Yes please call around, maybe bundling with auto again would help. I trust your judgment on this more than mine.

subject: Re: Renewal options
snippet: Got a couple quotes. Bundling saves about $30 a month over what you're paying no...
body: Got a couple quotes. Bundling saves about $30 a month over what you're paying now, similar coverage. There's also a slightly cheaper plan but the deductible is higher, I wouldn't recommend it for the house.

subject: Re: Renewal options
snippet: Let's go with the bundle then, sounds like the smarter move. Thank you for diggi...
body: Let's go with the bundle then, sounds like the smarter move. Thank you for digging into this, I never would have gotten around to it.

subject: Re: Renewal options
snippet: No problem at all. I'll finalize it this week and send you the confirmation once...
body: No problem at all. I'll finalize it this week and send you the confirmation once it's done. Effective date should line up right when the old policy expires so there's no gap.

subject: Vendor invoice question
snippet: Mom, the caterer from the brunch sent an invoice that's higher than the quote we...
body: Mom, the caterer from the brunch sent an invoice that's higher than the quote we agreed on. Did you add anything extra when you talked to them, or should I dispute the difference?

subject: Re: Vendor invoice question
snippet: I didn't add anything on my end. Go ahead and ask them for a breakdown, might ju...
body: I didn't add anything on my end. Go ahead and ask them for a breakdown, might just be a mistake on their part. Let me know what they say and I'll help cover the difference if it's legit.

subject: Apartment lease renewal
snippet: Mom, my landlord sent the renewal paperwork for the apartment. They're offering ...
body: Mom, my landlord sent the renewal paperwork for the apartment. They're offering a 12-month at a small increase or a month-to-month at a much higher rate. Leaning toward the 12-month, what do you think?

subject: Re: Apartment lease renewal
snippet: The 12-month makes sense if you're not planning any big moves soon. The month-to...
body: The 12-month makes sense if you're not planning any big moves soon. The month-to-month rate sounds like a lot just for flexibility you probably won't use.

subject: Re: Apartment lease renewal
snippet: That's what I figured too. We're not looking to move with the kids in school her...
body: That's what I figured too. We're not looking to move with the kids in school here, so I'll sign the 12-month tonight and send it back. Thanks for talking it through with me.

subject: Newsletter — this week's reads
snippet: Mom, sending you this week's picks from that newsletter you liked — there's a go...
body: Mom, sending you this week's picks from that newsletter you liked — there's a good piece on managing burnout in nursing and another on a new sleep study. Thought of you for both.

subject: Re: Newsletter — this week's reads
snippet: Reading the burnout one now, honestly hits close to home this week. Thank you fo...
body: Reading the burnout one now, honestly hits close to home this week. Thank you for always thinking to send these, I never remember to subscribe to anything myself.

subject: Re: Newsletter — this week's reads
snippet: Glad it's useful. There was also a short one about a local community garden open...
body: Glad it's useful. There was also a short one about a local community garden opening near you, thought you might want to check it out on a day off.

subject: Re: Newsletter — this week's reads
snippet: Oh that's exciting, I've wanted a garden plot for ages. Send me the link when yo...
body: Oh that's exciting, I've wanted a garden plot for ages. Send me the link when you get a chance, I might sign up before spots fill.

subject: Schedule check — kids pickup
snippet: Mom, can you check your calendar for Thursday? Dave's stuck at a work thing and ...
body: Mom, can you check your calendar for Thursday? Dave's stuck at a work thing and I've got a late meeting, would you be able to grab Tyler and Emma from school around 3?

subject: Re: Schedule check — kids pickup
snippet: I'm off Thursday so that works fine. I'll be there by 3 and can keep them at my ...
body: I'm off Thursday so that works fine. I'll be there by 3 and can keep them at my place until you're done, no rush picking them up.

subject: Re: Schedule check — kids pickup
snippet: You're a lifesaver, thank you. I should be done around 6, I'll swing by after. E...
body: You're a lifesaver, thank you. I should be done around 6, I'll swing by after. Emma has a snack allergy list on the fridge if you need a reminder.

subject: Re: Schedule check — kids pickup
snippet: I still have it saved from last time, don't worry. I'll do something simple for ...
body: I still have it saved from last time, don't worry. I'll do something simple for dinner, maybe grilled cheese, that's always safe.

subject: Re: Schedule check — kids pickup
snippet: That sounds perfect, they'll be thrilled. Thanks again Mom, I'll text you when I...
body: That sounds perfect, they'll be thrilled. Thanks again Mom, I'll text you when I'm on my way so you're not stuck waiting around.

subject: Family vacation planning
snippet: Mom, we're starting to look at a family trip for August, maybe the lake house ag...
body: Mom, we're starting to look at a family trip for August, maybe the lake house again if it's available. Would you and want to join us for a few days like last year?

subject: Re: Family vacation planning
snippet: I would love that, just let me know the dates so I can request the time off earl...
body: I would love that, just let me know the dates so I can request the time off early. Last year's trip was one of my favorite weeks all year.

subject: Weekend plans
snippet: Any plans this weekend, Mom? We were thinking of doing a low-key cookout Saturda...
body: Any plans this weekend, Mom? We were thinking of doing a low-key cookout Saturday if you're free, nothing fancy, just family.

subject: Re: Weekend plans
snippet: Nothing on my calendar, I'd love to come. Want me to bring anything, maybe that ...
body: Nothing on my calendar, I'd love to come. Want me to bring anything, maybe that potato salad the kids like?

subject: Re: Weekend plans
snippet: Yes please, that would be perfect. We'll start around 4 so it's not too hot. See...
body: Yes please, that would be perfect. We'll start around 4 so it's not too hot. See you Saturday, can't wait.

subject: Sunday hymn suggestion: Be Thou My Vision
snippet: Reverend, I'd love to put Be Thou My Vision in the bulletin for Sunday's servi...
body: Reverend, I'd love to put Be Thou My Vision in the bulletin for Sunday's service. It suits the readings and the older folks in the pews know every verse. Shall I let the organist know?

subject: Herbal note: cinnamon tea for blood sugar
snippet: Following up on your question at clinic. For cinnamon tea for blood sugar, ste...
body: Following up on your question at clinic. For cinnamon tea for blood sugar, steep gently and take twice daily. This is for comfort, not a substitute for Dr. Chambers' care — please keep your appointment.
